baseline.observed: matching_source_files used filter_map(Result::ok), so WalkDir traversal errors were silently dropped before collect_from_source could record a source note.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because summary.notes was empty for an unreadable traversal entry.

change.summary: matching_source_files now yields Result<PathBuf, walkdir::Error> lazily, and collect_from_source records walk errors as source notes.

verification.result: PASS: 9 quiet UI helper tests, Vite build, 32 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: The source file iterator remains lazy.
The prior scan limit file-walk regression still passes.
Traversal errors are recorded as notes so existing partial-warning promotion can surface them.
